response.overview: An alcoholic drifter blows into town, inhabiting a house haunted by a giant possessed teddy bear. Fearing for his life, he turns to the local psychic, Dick for help. It's a game of cat and mouse between man and bear. The man's liquor-driven panic mixed with Dick's southern twang is a recipe for disaster, and with a killer stuffed animal on their tails, the whole situation is unbearable.
response.title: Unbearable
